topic: Why napping after 3 PM ruins your sleep
caption: Did you know napping after 3 PM can sabotage your nighttime sleep? 🛋️ Here are the science-backed reasons: 1) Interferes with your body's natural sleep-wake cycle, 2) Reduces melatonin production, and 3) Affects your sleep quality. 💤 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🌞💆‍♀️👍
